deep.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
deep.one_line: 统一语言、图像、视频、音频和动作的多模态世界模型，为Physical AI提供框架

deep.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
deep.one_line: 将搜索agent的状态管理外化到环境，用强化学习专注语义决策，提升训练效率。

deep.title: VideoKR: Towards Knowledge- and Reasoning-Intensive Video Understanding
deep.one_line: 人机协同技能导向数据生成流程，可迁移至自进化数据管线

radar.title: LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards
radar.one_line: 利用搜索轨迹和rubric奖励训练长上下文推理

radar.title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
radar.one_line: 探讨将PEFT作为持久化本地状态以实现大规模个性化模型，提供可迁移的缩放模式

radar.title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
radar.one_line: 揭示搜索agent中掩盖陈旧观测的收益与代价及其机制区间

radar.title: Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution
radar.one_line: 提出Code2LoRA，用超网络生成仓库专用LoRA适配器

radar.title: TIDE: Proactive Multi-Problem Discovery via Template-Guided Iteration
radar.one_line: 模板引导迭代的主动多问题发现框架，可迁移至自主探索系统。

radar.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
radar.one_line: 训练搜索agent通过shell命令直接与语料库交互，提供新型搜索交互模式

radar.title: Mellum2 Technical Report
radar.one_line: 12B MoE代码模型的技术报告，展示高效训练和工程模式，可迁移至agent系统构建。

radar.title: Audio Interaction Model
radar.one_line: 提出统一的在线音频交互模型，实现实时感知-决策-响应循环

radar.title: SANA-Streaming: Real-time Streaming Video Editing with Hybrid Diffusion Transformer
radar.one_line: 系统算法协同设计实现实时流视频编辑，展示混合架构与推理优化模式

radar.title: Representation Forcing for Bottleneck-Free Unified Multimodal Models
radar.one_line: 通过表示预测消除统一多模态模型中的VAE瓶颈，可迁移至多模态接口设计。
